name: Entity Attach / Leash
desc: Sets an entity's leash attachment or vehicle mounting.

fields.name: leash
fields.desc: True if this is a leash attachment, false if it's a vehicle mount

notes: Used for both: stacking entities (boat/cart passengers) and leash (lead) attachments. -1 vehicleId means detach.

implementation.overview: Attach/detach entity leash or vehicle mount. Modules: ESP, AntiBot.
